parsedJson.summary: Clean professional design for a digital marketing agency, but critical mismatch with roofing business expectations and missing local trust signals

issues.title: Wrong business identity - SEO agency not roofing contractor
issues.what_observed: The header reads 'HURRICANE DIGITAL' with navigation for Services, Our Team, Blog, and hero text 'Transform Your Local Business with Expert Digital Marketing' alongside an office interior photo showing the Hurricane Digital brand on monitors
issues.why_problem: A customer searching 'roofing Brisbane' expects to see a roofing company website with roof photos, service areas, and contact information. Landing on a digital marketing agency website creates immediate confusion and distrust - they will assume they clicked the wrong result and leave within 2-3 seconds
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero section showing actual roof restoration work (before/after photos of Brisbane roofs), company name matching the roofing business, headline like 'Brisbane's Trusted Roof Restoration & Repairs', phone number prominently displayed with service area callout
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace entire hero with roofing-specific branding, authentic job site photography, clear service offering (roof restoration/repairs/maintenance), prominent click-to-call button, and Brisbane service area badge
issues.plain_explanation: 网站展示的是一家数字营销公司(Hurricane Digital),而不是屋顶修复公司。访客搜索「布里斯班屋顶维修」时,期望看到屋顶工程的照片和联系方式,但这个网站是推销SEO服务的。
issues.customer_impact: 这会导致近100%的访客立即离开。在本地搜索中,用户平均只给网站3-5秒来判断是否找对了公司。品牌不匹配=零转化,您的Google商家资料流量完全浪费。

issues.title: No phone number visible above fold
issues.what_observed: The header contains navigation links (Home, About Us, Services, Our Team, Blog, Contact) and two buttons ('CLIENT LOGIN' and 'SPEAK TO AN EXPERT') but no visible phone number or click-to-call element
issues.why_problem: 73% of local roofing searches are on mobile with high intent to call immediately. When someone has a leaking roof, they need to call NOW - not fill out forms or navigate menus. Hidden contact info signals the business doesn't want calls, which destroys trust for emergency services
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Large phone number in top-right header (e.g. '07 3XXX XXXX' in 18-20px font), styled as a tappable button on mobile with phone icon, visible on every page without scrolling
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add phone number as primary header element, styled as (07) 3XXX-XXXX with phone icon, linked as tel: on mobile, positioned right of logo, minimum 16px desktop / 18px mobile font size
issues.plain_explanation: 网站首屏没有显示电话号码。访客必须点击「Contact」或「SPEAK TO AN EXPERT」才能找到联系方式,但屋顶维修客户通常需要立即打电话,尤其是紧急漏水情况。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务搜索中,67%的手机用户会直接拨打首屏显示的电话号码。隐藏号码会让您损失大部分高意向客户—他们会返回搜索结果选择显示号码的竞争对手。每10个访客中可能损失6-7个咨询。

issues.title: Office interior photo instead of roofing work evidence
issues.what_observed: The hero section displays a circular photo of an office interior with computer monitors showing the Hurricane Digital brand, a desk setup, and indoor workspace - no outdoor or roofing-related imagery
issues.why_problem: Local service customers judge contractor credibility by seeing real work - trucks, crews, job sites, before/after results. An office photo signals a middleman or agency rather than actual tradespeople who do the work, reducing trust that they can handle physical roof repairs
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero image showing crew on a Brisbane roof with safety equipment, close-up of restoration work in progress, branded truck at job site, or dramatic before/after split of a completed restoration with visible transformation
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace hero image with authentic roofing job photography - ideally crew actively working on a local Brisbane home's roof, or high-quality before/after restoration imagery that proves capability
issues.plain_explanation: 首屏展示的是办公室内景照片(电脑屏幕、办公桌),而不是实际的屋顶施工照片。本地服务客户想看到真实的工作现场、施工队伍或修复前后对比,办公室照片无法证明实操能力。
issues.customer_impact: 对于屋顶维修这类需要上门服务的行业,客户需要看到「真实施工证据」才会信任。83%的本地服务客户表示施工照片直接影响他们是否咨询。缺少现场照片会让您看起来像中介而非真正的施工队,导致30-40%的访客流失。

issues.title: Digital marketing CTAs instead of service request
issues.what_observed: The primary call-to-action is an email signup field with 'Enter Your Email Here' placeholder and a 'Book Free Strategy Session' button, with secondary buttons 'CLIENT LOGIN' and 'SPEAK TO AN EXPERT' in the header
issues.why_problem: Roofing customers need a roof fixed, not a marketing strategy session. Asking for email signup creates friction and confusion - they expect 'Get a Free Quote', 'Request Inspection', or 'Call Now'. The language mismatch makes visitors question if this is the right business
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Primary CTA button reading 'Get Free Roof Inspection' or 'Request Quote' positioned prominently, secondary 'Call Now: (07) 3XXX XXXX' button with phone icon, form with Name/Phone/Suburb fields (not email-first)
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace strategy session form with roofing-specific quote request: 'Get Your Free Roof Inspection' headline, simple form (Name, Phone, Suburb, Brief Issue), large submit button, phone CTA as alternative path
issues.plain_explanation: 网站要求访客「预约免费策略会议」并输入邮箱,但屋顶客户需要的是「免费检查报价」或「立即拨打」。这种数字营销行业的话术让访客困惑,不知道如何获得屋顶服务。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务客户希望快速获得报价或预约检查,而不是参加营销会议。错误的CTA文案会让52%的访客认为网站与他们的需求不符而离开。正确的CTA(如「免费屋顶检查」)可以将表单提交率提高3-4倍。

issues.title: Missing Brisbane service area callout
issues.what_observed: The hero headline says 'Transform Your Local Business with Expert Digital Marketing' with no geographic indicator, service area map, or 'Serving Brisbane' callout anywhere in the visible section
issues.why_problem: Local searchers need immediate confirmation they found a Brisbane-based business that services their suburb. Without 'Serving Brisbane' or service area badges, mobile users (who can't easily check footer) may assume the business is interstate or too far away and leave
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero headline includes 'Brisbane' (e.g. 'Brisbane's Trusted Roof Restoration'), plus badge or text line 'Servicing Brisbane Northside, Southside & Bayside' with icons, positioned near phone number or below headline
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add 'Brisbane' to business name/headline, include 'Servicing All Brisbane Suburbs' badge near phone CTA, optionally add small service area map or suburb list in hero section or immediately below
issues.plain_explanation: 网站首屏没有明确标注「服务布里斯班地区」。本地搜索的客户需要立即确认公司是否覆盖自己的区域,缺少地理标识会让访客怀疑您是否能上门服务。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索中,访客会在8秒内判断公司是否「在我附近」。没有明确的服务区域标注,35-45%的手机用户会认为您可能不覆盖他们的suburb而返回搜索结果。添加「服务全布里斯班」标识可以立即提升信任和留存率。

issues.title: Six navigation items dilute focus from conversion action
issues.what_observed: The header navigation contains six items (Home, About Us, Services, Our Team, Blog, Contact) plus two additional buttons (CLIENT LOGIN, SPEAK TO AN EXPERT), creating eight total clickable options in the header
issues.why_problem: For a local service business, every extra navigation option reduces the likelihood visitors take the primary action (call or quote). High-intent roofing customers don't need to read blogs or learn about the team - they need to contact you quickly. Excessive options create decision paralysis
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Simplified navigation with 3-4 core items (Services, Gallery, Contact, About), phone number as prominent header element, single primary CTA button, blog/team moved to footer or removed
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce header to: Logo, Services (dropdown), Reviews, Contact, plus phone number and single 'Free Quote' button; move Blog, Team, Client Login to footer utility links
issues.plain_explanation: 导航栏有8个链接和按钮(Home、About Us、Services、Team、Blog、Contact、CLIENT LOGIN、SPEAK TO AN EXPERT),选项过多容易让访客分心,忘记打电话或填写表单。
issues.customer_impact: 研究显示,导航选项每增加一项,主要转化行动(致电或提交表单)的完成率下降5-8%。对于屋顶维修这种高意向服务,访客需要清晰、快速的转化路径。简化到3-4个核心选项可以将咨询率提升20-30%。

issues.title: CLIENT LOGIN button creates unnecessary cognitive load
issues.what_observed: The top-right header contains a dark blue rounded button labeled 'CLIENT LOGIN' positioned next to 'SPEAK TO AN EXPERT', both competing for visual attention
issues.why_problem: First-time visitors searching for roofing services are not clients yet - the login button is irrelevant to 99% of traffic and takes valuable header space. It suggests the business focuses on existing clients rather than new customers, and creates momentary confusion about whether they need an account
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Client login moved to small text link in footer or hidden behind utility menu icon; header space reserved for phone number and single primary CTA ('Get Free Quote' or 'Call Now')
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove CLIENT LOGIN from header, relocate to footer as small text link or behind hamburger menu utility section; dedicate header CTA space to new customer conversion actions only
issues.plain_explanation: 首屏右上角有「CLIENT LOGIN」(客户登录)按钮,但新访客不是现有客户,这个按钮对99%的潜在客户无用,还占据了宝贵的首屏位置。
issues.customer_impact: 首屏应该专注于新客户转化(致电或报价),而不是为少数老客户服务。无关按钮会分散注意力,让5-10%的访客误以为需要注册账户才能获取服务,直接导致流失。将登录功能移到页脚可以腾出空间展示更重要的联系方式。

positive_observations: Clean, uncluttered layout with good whitespace makes content easy to scan
Professional color scheme (blue/white) conveys trustworthiness if applied to correct business
Mobile-responsive design structure with clear hierarchy between headline and CTA
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace all Hurricane Digital branding/content with actual roofing business identity, authentic job site photography, and service-specific headline
2. Add prominent phone number in header (18px+, click-to-call) and replace 'strategy session' CTA with 'Get Free Roof Inspection' quote form
3. Add Brisbane service area callout to hero section and simplify navigation to 3-4 core items focused on conversion path
